---
title: "DP190101858_Analysis_Full_Overview_Transects"
author: "Jan Jansen"
date: "2019-2022"
output: html_document
---

This is an overview of all individual image transects

Stats for the database:
Survey ; # images ; # in subset  ;  Biigle annotations

WAP:      2374
NBP1402:   761                          ? 2628 ?
PS06:      500
PS14:     1523
PS18:     1705
PS61:       69
PS81:    14543                           83471
PS96:     2736                            7692
PS118:    7702
TAN0802: 13045                            6653
TAN1802:  7470                           12977
TAN1901:  8301                           17642


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(SOmap)
library(viridis) ## for a nice continuous color palette (viridis or magma)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(graticule)

source("C:/Users/jjansen/Desktop/science/Scripts/small R scripts and functions/SOmap_functions_JJ.R")

env.dir <- "C:/Users/jjansen/Desktop/science/data_environmental/"
bio.dir <- "C:/Users/jjansen/Desktop/science/data_biological/"

##### load still and diatom sample locations and bathymetry:
load(paste0(bio.dir,"Circumpolar_downwardstills_locations.Rdata"))
load(paste0(bio.dir,"Circumpolar_diatom_locations.Rdata"))
r2 <- raster(paste0(env.dir,"Circumpolar_EnvData_bathy_fulldepth.gri"))$depth

##### load coastline
stereo <- as.character(r2@crs)
#coast.lonlat <- shapefile("C:/Users/jjansen/Desktop/science/data_environmental/antarctic coastline/addv5_sc_coast_ln_gg.shp")
#coast.proj <- spTransform(coast.lonlat, CRS(stereo))
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
##### set colour parameters
## disrete colours:
leg.cols <- brewer.pal(12,"Paired")

## set continuous colors for raster:
#better.ramp2 <- grDevices::colorRampPalette(c("#54A3D1", "#54A3D1", "#54A3D1", "#54A3D1", "#54A3D1", "#54A3D1", "#60B3EB", "#60B3EB", "#78C8F0", "#98D1F5", "#B5DCFF", "#BDE1F0", "#CDEBFA", "#D6EFFF", "#EBFAFF")) #, "grey99", "grey90", "grey92", "grey94", "grey96", "white"
#blues <- c(blues9[9],blues9[9],rev(blues9))
blues <- rev(blues9)

## choose depending on the bathymetry file used (whether deeper than -3000 is NA or not)
better.ramp2 <- grDevices::colorRampPalette(blues)
# cols <- better.ramp2(99)
# breaks <- seq(-3000,0,length.out=100)
# leg.args <- seq(-3000,0, by=500)

full.ramp <- grDevices::colorRampPalette(c("black","grey15","grey25",blues))
cols <- full.ramp(132)
breaks <- c(seq(-7500,-3000,length.out=34),seq(-2500,0,length.out=100))
leg.args <- seq(-7500,0, by=500)

ross_sea_cols <- leg.cols[c(4,8,11)]
wap_cols <- leg.cols[c(4,8,11,6)]

pch <- 20
cex <- 2

breaks <- c(seq(-7500,-3000,length.out=34),seq(-2500,0,length.out=100))
leg.args <- seq(-7500,0, by=500)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
proj.list <- polar.dat.list.clean
proj.list.s <- polar.dat.subset.list

m.list <- list()
for(i in 1:length(polar.dat.start.list)){
  m.list[[i]] <- extract(r2, proj.list[[i]]@coords)
}
```


```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
## puffer for plotting:
puff <- 500
##
for(i in 1:length(proj.list)){
  par(mfrow=c(2,2), mar=c(2,2,4,0))
  print(names(proj.list)[i])
  
  dat <- dat.list.clean[[i]]
  dat2 <- dat.subset.list[[i]]
  col.sel <- which(names(dat)=="transectID")
  col.sel2 <- which(names(dat2)=="transectID")
  col.sel.annotated <- which(names(dat)=="image.select")
  col.sel.annotated2 <- which(names(dat2)=="image.select")
  transects <- levels(dat[,col.sel])
  transects2 <- levels(dat2[,col.sel2])

  for(k in 1:length(transects)){
    row.sel <- which(dat[,col.sel]==transects[k])
    row.sel2 <- which(dat2[,col.sel2]==transects2[k])
    
    plot.dims <- extent(proj.list[[i]][row.sel])
    main <- paste0(names(proj.list)[i]," - ",transects[k],"\n",length(row.sel2)," of ",length(row.sel)," images; ", round(total.t.length.list.clean[[i]][k],0),"m transect")
    
    plot(r2, xlim=c(plot.dims[1]-puff,plot.dims[2]+puff), ylim=c(plot.dims[3]-puff,plot.dims[4]+puff), main=main, col=cols, breaks=breaks, legend=FALSE)
    points(proj.list[[i]][row.sel], col="yellow")
    points(proj.list.s[[i]][row.sel2],col="red")
    
    d <- round(range(m.list[[i]][row.sel], na.rm=T),0)
    legend("topleft",legend=paste0("Min depth: ", d[2],"m"))
    legend("topright",legend=paste0("Max depth: ",d[1],"m"))
  }
  }
```




```{r, echo=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
# range(dat.list$PS81$Bathy.depth..m.)
# range(dat.list$PS96$Depth.water..m.)
# range(dat.list$PS118$Depth.water..m.)
# range(dat.list$TAN1802$SUB1_USBL_Depth)
# range(dat.list$TAN1901$SUB1_USBL_Depth)
# range(dat.list$NBP1402$Depth)

plot(dat.list$PS81$Bathy.depth..m.)
plot(dat.list$PS96$Depth.water..m.)
plot(dat.list$PS118$Depth.water..m.)
plot(dat.list$TAN1802$SUB1_USBL_Depth)
plot(dat.list$TAN1901$SUB1_USBL_Depth)
plot(dat.list$NBP1402$Depth)
```
